/usr/bin/c++  -g -Wall CMakeFiles/client.dir/client.cc.o CMakeFiles/client.dir/account.cc.o CMakeFiles/client.dir/friend.cc.o CMakeFiles/client.dir/group.cc.o "CMakeFiles/client.dir/home/cx33071/muduo-/base/CurrentThread.cc.o" "CMakeFiles/client.dir/home/cx33071/muduo-/base/logger.cc.o" "CMakeFiles/client.dir/home/cx33071/muduo-/base/logStream.cc.o" "CMakeFiles/client.dir/home/cx33071/muduo-/base/Timestamp.cc.o" "CMakeFiles/client.dir/home/cx33071/muduo-/net/Acceptor.cc.o" "CMakeFiles/client.dir/home/cx33071/muduo-/net/Buffer.cc.o" "CMakeFiles/client.dir/home/cx33071/muduo-/net/Channel.cc.o" "CMakeFiles/client.dir/home/cx33071/muduo-/net/Connector.cc.o" "CMakeFiles/client.dir/home/cx33071/muduo-/net/Epoller.cc.o" "CMakeFiles/client.dir/home/cx33071/muduo-/net/EventLoop.cc.o" "CMakeFiles/client.dir/home/cx33071/muduo-/net/EventLoopThreadpool.cc.o" "CMakeFiles/client.dir/home/cx33071/muduo-/net/SocketOps.cc.o" "CMakeFiles/client.dir/home/cx33071/muduo-/net/TcpClient.cc.o" "CMakeFiles/client.dir/home/cx33071/muduo-/net/TcpConnection.cc.o" "CMakeFiles/client.dir/home/cx33071/muduo-/net/TcpServer.cc.o" "CMakeFiles/client.dir/home/cx33071/muduo-/net/Timer.cc.o" "CMakeFiles/client.dir/home/cx33071/muduo-/net/TimerQueue.cc.o" -o client  -Wl,-rpath,/usr/local/lib -lpthread /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libcurl.so /usr/local/lib/libcpp_redis.so /usr/local/lib/libtacopie.a
